name: NTT_inverse
label: Algorithm 10

inputs.name: f_hat
inputs.description: 256-element array modulo q representing NTT of a polynomial

outputs.name: f
outputs.description: 256-element array modulo q representing coefficients of the inverse NTT result

body_raw: for (j <- start; j < start + len; j++)
f[j] <- t + f[j + len] mod q
f[j + len] <- zeta * (f[j + len] - t) mod q
